SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-23-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CHARLES KATZ--MEMBER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
